instruction: The columns icon has two problems: it's been tinted purple AND the canvas is clipping it (80x96). Restore both the color and the viewBox.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 80 96" width="80" height="96">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="80" height="96" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/columns.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #a855f7" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M12 3h7a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-7m0-18H5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h7m0-18v18"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/columns.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M12 3h7a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-7m0-18H5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h7m0-18v18"/></g>
</svg>
